Claim random reward from 1 to 50 LOYAL (Loyalty Labs)

Rule: Only active holders (1+ LOYAL or equivalent in another token) are able to claim the airdrop.

Welcome to LOYAL - The Loyalty Program of ben.eth.
After the immense success of $BEN and $PSYOP,  I'm launching a new loyalty program for the holders. Simply connect your wallet to receive a random amount of $LOYAL (Loyalty Labs) tokens as part of the Airdrop. Engage with the $LOYAL community, spread the word, invite your friends and help the community to grow even stronger. Stay tuned for updates! And remember - Loyalty always pays off. Good luck!
